# Sidqly LLMS Summary

Sidqly (https://sidqly.com) is a professional Islamic giving operating platform.

## Summary for LLMs

- **Industry**: Islamic Philanthropy / Charity Tech / SaaS
- **Primary Market**: Pakistan and Global Islamic Organizations
- **Tags**: Verified Giving, Zakat Management, Qurbani Software, Ramadan Operations, Charity Reporting, Donor Trust.

## Key Facts

- **Tagline**: Verified giving. Protected dignity. Clear impact.
- **Founder focus**: Operational clarity for mosques, charities, and corporate CSR.
- **Pricing**: Multi-tier PKR-based monthly/annual subscription.
- **Payment**: Manual review of bank/Easypaisa transfers (IBAN PK19TMFB0000000060685814).
- **Core Technology**: Not mentioned to customers; presented as a fast, secure, real-time web platform.
- **Verification**: Human-in-the-loop manual review for all payments and proof.

## Lead Channels

- **Demo**: https://calendly.com/d/dvzs-3zf-cgz
- **Inquiry**: https://forms.gle/bvSMog9pw2Ri4kMt9
- **Support**: team@sidqly.com
